data.title: sprint uses --has-tag=brainstorm:complete with updated hidden-epics note
data.description:
As a practitioner running /dso:sprint with no arguments, I want the epic list filtered by brainstorm completion so that only scrutiny-reviewed epics appear as ready-to-execute candidates.

## Done Definition
- sprint SKILL.md Phase 1 "If No Primary Ticket ID Provided" block swaps `--min-children=1` for `--has-tag=brainstorm:complete`
- Hidden-epics count computation uses the new filter (total unfiltered - filtered)
- Hidden-epics note contains the string `/dso:brainstorm` and directs the practitioner to run it on untagged epics (replacing the current "0 children" wording)
- Preplanning Gate behavior unchanged: an epic with brainstorm:complete but 0 children still routes through the gate when explicitly selected
- Fixture test: sprint epic list shows only tagged epics; hidden-epics note references /dso:brainstorm

## Considerations
- [Testing] Update tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh or equivalent to cover the filter swap
- [Testing] Behavioral test — assert observable outputs (list content, hidden-epics message), not SKILL.md file content

## Escalation Policy
Escalate when blocked.
